title: Module Check: The Interview Algorithm Landscape

questions.question: Name the 6 steps of the UMPIRE framework in order.
questions.answer: Understand, Match, Plan, Implement, Review, Evaluate

questions.question: According to the Pareto principle applied to interviews, approximately what percentage of problems can be solved with the top 20% of patterns?
In a 4-week study plan, which topic cluster belongs in week 3?
questions.answer: Binary search, two pointers, and sliding window

questions.question: At which UMPIRE step should you write the first line of code?
questions.answer: I (Implement) — only after completing U, M, and P

questions.question: What are the top 5 high-frequency algorithm patterns that cover the majority of interview problems?
questions.answer: Hash maps, two pointers/sliding window, BFS/DFS, binary search, dynamic programming
